abilities.name: Caustic Aura
abilities.description: Living characters beginning turn within a2 suffer 1 damage and cannot declare (0) Actions until next turn.

abilities.name: Controlled Deformation
abilities.description: If within 2 yards of 3+ characters with this ability at start of turn, absorbs them and becomes Desolation Engine. New Engine cannot act this round.

abilities.name: Horrifying Presence
abilities.description: When this character is created or revealed to Living characters, each must pass TN 10 Horror Duel.

actions: (1) Grasping Limbs (Pugilism) | AV: 3 (8) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage and becomes Slow.
(0) Absorb Corpse | If within 2 yards of a dead Living character, absorb it and heal 1 damage.
system.notes: Horrifying amalgamations of mechanical devices and rotting flesh from Old Malifaux. Warp living flesh when near. Can absorb bodies to repair themselves.
